text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heya, C.B.! Happy birthday! Your present is...
li'l... ol'... me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Or, that's what'd I'd say if I was taking you for a
drive, but you'd rather feel the wind on your legs,
wouldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Hehe, so, what is it really then?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you already know! We're going out
somewhere to run and feel the wind together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Exactly like I thought—a fantastic present!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: But is this really a gift for me? Are you sure you don't just want to run yourself?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll never tell. I can't have my heart
revealed!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hah, of course, of course. Sorry, how unrefined of
me.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Shall we head to the track? I know I can trust you
to give me the best present ever.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well! You'd better be prepared, because I'm going to make it even better than that. ♪
